DTR  |  Listen to a Short Exchange
LSE-MS7-L4-13001400-MSVPA-RWS-CFI-01 • MS Visual and Performing Arts (Music) Grade 7

The Assembly Setlist

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why do the girl and boy need to change their setlist?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Build a full justification: make a claim about why the girl says their list needs to change, explain the reasoning she gives in the dialogue, and state the conclusion about what the list was supposed to do.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NCAS Music Pr4.1  |  MS Visual and Performing Arts (Music) Grade 7: Apply Criteria for Selecting Music of Contrasting Styles
